obligation.goal:
sig
  (fun ls : list propLetter =>
   and
     (NW
        (fun OCCURS : unit =>
         match OCCURS with
         | tt => forall l : propLetter, iff (List.In l ls) (occurs l C)
         end))
     (NW
        (fun INFERS_DEC : unit =>
         match INFERS_DEC with
         | tt =>
             forall e : forall _ : propLetter, bool,
             let Gamma := E.fromList (gen_context_for e ls) in
             if eval_bool e C
             then infers Gamma C
             else infers Gamma (NegationF C)
         end)))

proofs: induction C as [i | | p IHp | p IHp q IHq | p IHp q IHq | p IHp q IHq | p IHp q IHq]; try (exists (i :: nil); split; [simpl; intros l; split; [intros [H|[]]; subst; auto | intros H; subst; auto] | intros e; simpl; destruct (e i); apply ByAssumption; simpl; auto]).
